    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Animal
     
    Cat
    Class representing a Cat, which is a type of Animal that can walk and hunt.
    Main
     
    Mouse
    Class representing a Mouse, which is a type of Animal that can walk and flee.
    Predator
    Interface representing predator behavior.
    Prey
    Interface representing prey behavior.
    Walkable
    Interface representing walkable behavior.
    ZooManager
    Class to manage a collection of animals in a zoo.
